svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="r2web-architecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-663" dy="-287" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1300" pageHeight="1120" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=20;fontColor=#1f7a44;" value="r2web — drag-drop Ghidra + radare2 parallel decompiler" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="800" x="40" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontColor=#5c7d63;" value="Pure-stdlib Python backend · project = folder · N r2 workers (N = CPU cores) → one .c file" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="900" x="40" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bA" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1a3c6e;verticalAlign=top;" value="Browser — static/index.html (single-file Web UI)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="1120" x="40" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a1" parent="bA" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf2ff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="🧬 Drop zone / file picker
(drag anywhere or click)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="230" x="30" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a2" parent="bA" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf2ff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="📁 Project dropdown
(switch = ~/r2web/&lt;proj&gt;)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="220" x="300" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a3" parent="bA" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf2ff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="⏳ Progress modal
(funcs/sec · threads)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="220" x="560" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a4" parent="bA" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf2ff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="📄 Result list (.c files)
click → open folder" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="250" x="830" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bB" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7a4a00;verticalAlign=top;" value="r2web server — server.py (ThreadingHTTPServer @ 127.0.0.1:8765, stdlib only)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="1120" x="40" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b1" parent="bB" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2e0;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="HTTP API router
/api/decompile · /status · /result
/projects · /tree · /open" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="320" x="30" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b2" parent="bB" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2e0;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Job manager
async job store + background thread
(status / rate / done)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="300" x="430" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3" parent="bB" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fdf0e0;strokeColor=#d79b00;dashed=1;" value="safe_path() sandbox
all I/O under ~/r2web/" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="280" x="800" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bC" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#2d5a2d;verticalAlign=top;" value="Decompile pipeline — radare2 + r2ghidra (parallel across all CPU cores)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="330" width="1120" x="40" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1" parent="bC" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6f5e6;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="radare2 analysis (once)
aaa → discover functions
aflj (filter imports/loc)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="250" x="30" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c2" parent="bC" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Split functions
across N chunks
(N = CPU cores)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="180" x="330" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c3a" parent="bC" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6f5e6;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="r2 worker #1 — af; pdg @ addr (streams markers)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="290" x="560" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c3b" parent="bC" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6f5e6;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="r2 worker #2 — af; pdg @ addr (streams markers)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="290" x="560" y="121" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c3c" parent="bC" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6f5e6;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="r2 worker #N — af; pdg @ addr (streams markers)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="290" x="560" y="187" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c4" parent="bC" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Concatenate
→ one &lt;binary&gt;.c
(dup → (1),(2)…)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="180" x="910" y="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bD" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;verticalAlign=top;" value="Storage & OS integration" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="1120" x="40" y="880" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d1" parent="bD" style="shape=folder;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;verticalAlign=bottom;" value="~/r2web/&lt;project&gt;/&lt;binary&gt;.c
projects = plain folders" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="300" x="30" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d2" parent="bD" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontColor=#4a2d5a;" value="Dolphin / OS file manager
kstart --application · DBus FileManager1
(reveal folder, Wayland-safe raise)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="300" x="430" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="a1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;flowAnimation=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.25;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="b1" value="POST /api/decompile
(raw body · X-Filename)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="b1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=2;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1f7a44, #5eac7d); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
